testcase.name: test_evite_copy_premium_past_event

self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="3b34425b881e8dfe63de48366c7d0b7e")> method = <function Page.assert_url_contains.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7f9c5d59e020> message = ''
def until(self, method: Callable[[D], Literal[False] | T], message: str = "") -> T: """Wait until the method returns a value that is not False.
Calls the method provided with the driver as an argument until the return value does not evaluate to ``False``.
Args: method: A callable object that takes a WebDriver instance as an argument. message: Optional message for TimeoutException.
Returns: The result of the last call to `method`.
Raises: TimeoutException: If 'method' does not return a truthy value within the WebDriverWait object's timeout.
Example: >>> from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By >>> from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait >>> from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC >>> >>> # Wait until an element is visible on the page >>> wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10) >>> element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "exampleId"))) >>> print(element.text) """ screen = None stacktrace = None
end_time = time.monotonic() + self._timeout while True: try: value = method(self._driver) if value: return value except self._ignored_exceptions as exc: screen = getattr(exc, "screen", None) stacktrace = getattr(exc, "stacktrace", None) if time.monotonic() > end_time: break time.sleep(self._poll) > raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message:
end_time = 64051662.772105195 message = '' method = <function Page.assert_url_contains.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x7f9c5d59e020> screen = None self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="3b34425b881e8dfe63de48366c7d0b7e")> stacktrace = None value = False
../../../1026/venv/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/support/wait.py:121: TimeoutException
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_copy_premium_past_event.TestEviteCopyPremiumPastEvent object at 0x7f9c5ddc9a30> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f9c5d926ba0>
def test_evite_copy_premium_past_event(self, config): """ Copy premium past event: Select past event from DB Copy Change title, time, etc Update and Delete guest list, then update total guest list Send event Verify
:param config: :return: """
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3])
logger.info(f"Start {inspect.stack()[0][3]}")
page = config.pages["page"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] evite_event_page = config.pages["evite_event_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
page.get_url(config.environment, "")
user_email_addr = "" user_pass = "" user_first_name = "" user_last_name = "" event_title = "" cursor = None
# Get event with event_date > 2023-04-01 which is fabric
psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) db_connect = psql_db.connect_db()
if self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"]: user_email_addr = self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"] user_pass = self._json_test_data["sign_in_credentials"]["password"] else: sql_string = ( "SELECT %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s FROM %s WHERE event_create_date > '%s' " "AND event_sent_date > '%s'" "AND env = '%s' " "AND event_cancelled = '%s' " "AND event_premium = '%s' " "AND event_draft = '%s' " "AND event_draft_guests = '%s' " "AND created_by = '%s'" "ORDER BY random() LIMIT %s;" % ( "user_email_addr", "user_pass", "event_title", "event_id", "event_date", "event_premium", settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, "2023-04-01", "2023-04-01", settings.ENV, False, True, False, False, "evite", 1, ) )
try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string)
# Check result first, if no data then don't fail: Skip if cursor.rowcount: user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title, event_id, event_date, event_premium = cursor.fetchone() else: msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warning(msg) pytest.skip(msg)
except psycopg.Error as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success")
# Log in with fetched user
# Log in with fetched user login_modal.sign_in(email=user_email_addr, password=user_pass)
# Get user's first and last name sql_string = psql_db.get_select_from_table_string( settings.DB_TABLE_USERS, ["user_first_name", "user_last_name"], user_email_addr=user_email_addr ) try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string) if cursor.rowcount: user_first_name, user_last_name = cursor.fetchone() else: config.test_failed["value"] = False msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warning(msg) pytest.skip(msg) except psycopg.Error as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success") finally: if cursor: cursor.close() if db_connect: db_connect.close()
evite_home_page.select_logged_in_menu(action="events")
# First verify event, we have bad data in db if not my_events.find_event(event_title=event_title, fail=False): # There is a mismatch between event and host, delete the row sql_string = "DELETE FROM %s WHERE user_email_addr = '%s';" % (settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, user_email_addr) psql_db.db_execute(sql_string)
config.test_failed["value"] = False pytest.skip(f"Can't find event {event_title}")
my_events.select_event_options(event_title=event_title, event_option="copy_invitation", url="preview") # Update title self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = f"{event_title}-copy" # Get random date between today and range specified in settings self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) # Get random time between 1-12, random :00 or :30, random AM or PM self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() # Update host # NOTE: We might enter different host name here, so can check if JSON data there then don't do update self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = f"{user_first_name} {user_last_name}"
# Step 5: Add Guests step1_template.select_next(url="guests") guest_list = step5_guests.fetch_all_guests_upload_file() guests_to_delete = [guest_list.pop()] step5_guests.delete_guests(guests_to_delete=guests_to_delete)
step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"]) step1_template.select_next(url="review")
> step6_review_send.enter_checkout_page(test_data=self._json_test_data, url="confirm")

self = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7f9c5d926810> search_string = 'confirm'
def assert_url_contains(self, search_string): """ Verify the current url contains the passed in string :param search_string: :return: """ screen_shot_helper = ScreenShotHelper(self.test_name) search_string = search_string.lower()
try: WebDriverWait(self.selenium, self.timeout).until( lambda s: search_string in self.selenium.current_url.lower() ) self.logger.info("Verified URL contains: %s", search_string) except TimeoutException: screen_shot_helper.take_screen_shot(self.selenium) current_url = self.selenium.current_url > assert False, f"Can't verify page url contains {search_string}, current url: {current_url}" E AssertionError: Can't verify page url contains confirm, current url: https://test59.evitelabs.com/invitation/012FIIAE4SKDAAO4IEPRDXMPVTNTYI/review?previous=copy_my_events&source_event=012FR46YZVAW444BSEPQFKPO4TSGTY
